sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70026" key="neh/fatos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεή-φᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νεόφατος,</foreign> <sense id="n70026.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">newly revealed,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὄσσα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg004.perseus-grc1:443" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Merc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">443</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
